name: Amaya High Speed 2GB Micro SDHC Card
description: Compact and highly durable 2GB Micro SDHC memory card engineered by Amaya Premium Accessories, offering reliable expandable storage and includes a convenient full-size SD adapter.
warning: Always unmount or safely eject the memory card from your device settings before physical removal to prevent data corruption.

name: Amaya High Speed 4GB Micro SDHC Card
description: A reliable 4GB Micro SDHC card built for everyday media storage, providing stable read and write speeds alongside an SD adapter for cross-device compatibility.
warning: Do not expose the memory card contacts to moisture, dust, or direct static electricity.

name: Amaya High Speed 8GB Micro SDHC Card
description: An excellent value 8GB memory expansion option designed for seamless integration with mobile devices and portable electronics, bundled with a protective full-size SD adapter.
warning: Formatting deletes all data; please back up your important files before performing a full card format.

name: Amaya High Speed 16GB Micro SDHC Card
description: Ample 16GB Micro SDHC storage card providing high-velocity performance for heavier multimedia loads, music libraries, applications, and HD media capture.
warning: Avoid using the memory card in unsupported legacy devices that do not explicitly recognize the SDHC standard.

name: Amaya Ultra Fast 32GB Micro SDXC Card
description: High-performance 32GB Micro SDXC flash memory card processing rapid transfer speeds up to 100MB/s for smooth HD video recordings and high-speed photography.
warning: Maximum speed performance metrics require a host device compatible with high-bandwidth UHS-I interface standards.

name: Amaya Pro Performance 256GB Micro SDXC Card
description: The ultimate high-capacity storage solution. Packs a massive 256GB grid delivering transfer speeds up to 100MB/s, making it perfect for intensive 4K filming, action cameras, and professional archives.
warning: Ensure your specific smartphone or camera model supports high-capacity 256GB SDXC formatting frameworks before deployment.
